description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a mix of dark vertical siding and horizontal wooden slats, creating a striking visual contrast. Large rectangular windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some spanning vertically and others set horizontally, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The roof is a single-sloped shed style, giving the structure a contemporary silhouette. The front includes a wide, flat overhang above a concrete driveway or patio area, suggesting a carport or sheltered entry. The main entryway is defined by a large glass door beneath the overhang, with no visible steps or porch, emphasizing clean lines and minimalism. The overall structure appears to be a single-story dwelling with open, spacious rooms and a focus on simplicity and function.
description: A modern, single-story house with dark vertical siding, horizontal wood accents, large asymmetrical windows, and a sloped shed roof. The design features a wide overhang and a glass entryway, emphasizing clean lines and contemporary style.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the house with a wide overhang, a large glass entry door, and a mix of vertical and horizontal siding.
description_view_1: The side view reveals a large horizontal window, a smaller window, and the continuation of the dark siding and wood accents.
description_view_2: This angle highlights the vertical strip of windows and the sloped shed roof, with a strong emphasis on the geometric facade.
description_view_3: The rear view displays a large horizontal window, a glass sliding door, and the intersection of wood and dark siding, with the driveway extending alongside.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Large glass door under a wide overhang, no steps or porch, minimalistic and flush with the facade
